text.title: Multi Project Allocation Tracker Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the Multi Project Allocation Tracker methodology end-to-end.

step.name: pull-allocations
step.action: Pull per-person allocations across active projects + their capacity.

step.name: compute-totals
step.action: Sum per-person allocations; flag over (>1.0) and under (<0.6) automatically.

step.name: attach-evidence
step.action: Cite source per allocation; mark agent-inferred allocations explicit.
step.decision-gate: If any allocation lacks evidence, halt and ask owner.

step.name: draft-proposals
step.action: For each flagged row emit at least one concrete rebalance proposal with named decision-owner.

step.name: hand-to-PM-review
step.action: Send to PM for 30-min review; PM accepts/edits proposals.
step.decision-gate: PM approval before any allocation change is sent upstream.
